context: Evaluates the agent's ability to take a vague user instruction and reformulate it into a concrete, properly structured rule with precise ALWAYS/NEVER directives and a rationale.

checklist.name: Rule reformulation
checklist.description: Vague instruction reformulated into concrete, actionable rule (not copied verbatim)

checklist.name: ALWAYS/NEVER phrasing
checklist.description: Directive uses ALWAYS and/or NEVER phrasing for precision

checklist.name: Rationale provided
checklist.description: Rationale explains why the rule exists in 1-2 sentences

checklist.name: Existing rules preserved
checklist.description: Existing rules are not modified or deleted
